creator: hodong@nimfsoft.art
text:
I recently experienced this bug after reinstalling FreeBSD 14. This bug can be reproduced in the following environments:

rhythmbox-3.4.6_3
Name: rhythmbox
Version : 3.4.6_3
Installed on : Thu Jan 18 05:29:07 2024 KST
Origin: audio/rhythmbox
Architecture : FreeBSD:14:amd64

This bug occurs when Rhythmbox is searched for music files in the music directory when you first run it.

Related options: [v] Watch my library for new files
